sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66917" key="metarruqmiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταρρυθμ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n66917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must alter, correct</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0748.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sever.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Clyst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
